description_long: This rifle features a robust, matte black synthetic stock and a metallic receiver, giving it a modern and utilitarian appearance. The barrel is long and slender, extending from a squared handguard, and ends with a simple muzzle device. The magazine is a detachable, curved box type, likely designed for rapid reloading and moderate capacity. The rifle includes a pistol grip for ergonomic handling and a fixed buttstock for stability during firing. Iron sights are integrated into the top of the receiver and barrel, providing basic aiming capability. The overall design suggests a focus on durability and functionality, suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern rifle with a black synthetic stock, metallic receiver, long barrel, and detachable curved magazine. It features iron sights and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, pistol grip, curved magazine, and long barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard, with the muzzle device visible at the tip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the magazine and stock clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the width of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the pistol grip and magazine partially visible.
